activities_projects.title: Comparison of Two Temples
activities_projects.objective: Understand the contrast between Pashupatinath and Baudhnath
steps: Read the descriptions of the two temples
List differences in atmosphere and surroundings
Write them in a comparison table

activities_projects.title: Description of Pashupatinath Scene
steps: Read the paragraph describing Pashupatinath
Write 5–6 lines explaining the crowded atmosphere

activities_projects.title: Street Life Observation
activities_projects.objective: Identify activities happening in Kathmandu streets
steps: Find examples of activities in the streets
Write at least six activities mentioned

activities_projects.title: Character Study of the Flute Seller
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the behaviour of the flute seller
steps: Read the paragraph describing the flute seller
Write 5 points about his behaviour and lifestyle

activities_projects.title: Sounds in Kathmandu
activities_projects.objective: Identify sound imagery in the lesson
steps: Find examples of sounds described in the lesson
Write them in your notebook

activities_projects.title: Author’s Feelings
steps: Read the last paragraphs of the lesson
Write how the author feels about the flute music

activities_projects.title: Travel Route Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand the route the author considered
steps: Identify the route mentioned by the author
List the places in order

activities_projects.title: Theme of the Lesson
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main idea of the prose
steps: Think about the experiences described
Write 5 lines explaining the theme

activities_projects.title: Descriptive Words Collection
steps: Find five descriptive words used in the lesson
Write their meanings

activities_projects.title: Message of the Lesson
steps: Think about what the author learns from the visit
Write the message in 4–5 sentences
